message:
style: rustfmt reformatting and Budget API rename in docs/examples

- Update Budget::deadline(Duration::from_secs(N)) references to
  Budget::with_deadline_secs(N) in scope macro docs, examples, and
  tests (scope.rs, cx.rs, macro-dsl.md) to match the current API
- Apply rustfmt line-wrapping across several files:
  - quic_native/connection.rs: wrap next_packet_number signature
  - quic_native/transport.rs: remove trailing whitespace
  - spectral_health.rs: break long convergence-tolerance conditions
  - task_inspector.rs: wrap long writeln!() call
  - spectral_complete_graph.rs: format import, spacing, method chain
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to UnixStreamInner::register_interest

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
